display_information.name: RSHIP Intelligence
display_information.description: RSHIP AGI Systems — sovereign intelligence for your enterprise. Market, supply chain, travel, network status, and full organism control — all from Slack.
display_information.long_description: RSHIP Intelligence connects your Slack workspace to the full RSHIP AGI agent network. HERALD handles intelligence queries (/rship). IMPERIUM controls the entire enterprise organism (/org). All powered by sovereign AI running on the Cloudflare global edge.

slash_commands.description: RSHIP intelligence — market, supply chain, flight, network status, ask the AI
Enterprise control — brief, agents, deploy, alerts, reports, broadcast
Broadcast a message to RSHIP intelligence channels
